## Summary

A concise description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

What pain point does this address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working. Sketches or mockups welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or anything else relevant.
